MeasureTop 10 Neurosynth-decoded feature terms

ThicknessSpatial (0.11), working memory (0.10), visuospatial (0.10), attentional (0.09), biological (0.08), motion (0.08), attention (0.07), action observation (0.07), moving (0.07), location (0.06)

Clusters of significant between-group differences (independent of age)
